request_payload.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vital expanded domestic security powers are. The threats we face today are more complex than ever, and our agencies need the tools to stay ahead. While some worry about civil liberties, the real risk is being unprepared. We can't afford to wait until it's too late. #NationalSecurityFirst
